name: Aunt Marguerite
notes: Talks a lot, loves a captive audience.
funFact: Once won a county pie contest three years running.

name: Cousin Theo
notes: Shy until he's had one drink.
funFact: Plays bass in a wedding-cover band.

name: Dev Patel
funFact: Has ridden all the trails near Lareau Farm.

name: Grandpa Lou
notes: Hard of hearing on the left side.
funFact: Was a jazz drummer in the '60s.

name: Uncle Ray
notes: Strong political opinions — keep away from Aunt Marguerite.

name: Sofia Ramos
notes: Dancer, will be first on the floor.

name: Ben Carter
funFact: Has a comet named after his thesis advisor.

name: Mei Tanaka
notes: New to the friend group, very kind.
